description_long: This is a tall, cylindrical bottle labeled 'camphor fresh', designed for personal care use, specifically for feet. The bottle is predominantly white with blue and green accents, featuring a large blue footprint graphic on the front. The label includes both Spanish and English text, highlighting its protective, refreshing, and softening properties. The back of the bottle lists ingredients, warnings, and usage instructions, along with certification and recycling symbols. The cap is flat and integrated into the cylinder, likely a twist or press-to-dispense type. The overall design is clean and modern, with a focus on hygiene and freshness.
description: A tall, cylindrical white bottle with blue and green accents, featuring a footprint graphic and detailed labeling for a foot care product.
description_view_0: Front view shows the 'camphor fresh' branding, a large blue footprint graphic, and product claims in Spanish.
description_view_1: Back view displays ingredients, warnings, and a circular certification graphic near the top.
description_view_2: Side view reveals partial branding and additional label text, with less prominent graphics.
description_view_3: Alternate front/side view highlights more product information and certification symbols, with the main branding partially visible.
attribute_label_text: camphor fresh Protege Refresca Suaviza Talco y polvado para tus Pies Foot and care for your feet INGREDIENTES: Talco, Blue Foot, Magnesio, Mentol, Camphor, Metil. ADVERTENCIAS: Mantener fuera del alcance de los niños. No aplicar sobre piel irritada o lastimada. En caso de irritación, suspender su uso y consultar a su médico. No ingerir. Uso externo. Conservar en lugar fresco y seco. Hecho en la República Mexicana por: Laboratorios Laver, S.A. de C.V. www.laver.com.mx
attribute_bottle_silhouette: tall and cylindrical with a flat top and straight sides
attribute_packaging_graphics: large blue footprint graphic, circular certification emblem, and small icons for recycling and product features
